rationale: Keep: the cited paper appears highly relevant as a methodological/foundational source, since it develops joint hierarchical Bayes response modeling for physician-level pharmaceutical detailing with nonrandom marketing-mix/endogeneity, and the citing paper also models physician prescriptions/detailing in statins with hierarchical Bayesian count models and endogeneity correction. Given this strong overlap in setting and core modeling problem, this is not clearly an incidental background mention.
